Comment: Dispatches a single S3 Batch Operations job (S3ReplicateObject) to backfill existing objects on the source bucket, reusing the live ReplicationConfiguration posted by setup (replicates to ALL configured destinations in one job, REPL-05). S3ReplicateObject batch jobs REQUIRE an existing live ReplicationConfiguration on the source bucket, so a GetBucketReplication precondition runs first (WR-05) and fails fast with NoReplicationConfigForBatch if setup has not run (or ran partially). Uses S3JobManifestGenerator (no S3 Inventory precondition) filtering objects with replication status NONE/FAILED. Native SDK only (no Lambda, REPL-06). The createJob Task assumes the source role imperatively via Credentials.RoleArn.$, passes AccountId explicitly, and supplies a fresh ClientRequestToken via States.UUID() with ConfirmationRequired:false (idempotency, T-07-04). A report is emitted only when a ReportBucketArn is provided (O1: this generic module owns no report bucket). Ordering contract: setup_cross_account_replication MUST run before run_batch_replication (the orchestrator enforces this in Phase 8).

CheckReplicationExists.Comment: Precondition (WR-05): a live ReplicationConfiguration must exist on the source bucket before a backfill batch job can reuse it. GetBucketReplication throws S3.ReplicationConfigurationNotFoundError when none exists -> NoReplicationConfigForBatch. Any other error -> BatchJobFailed.

HasReplicationRules.Comment: GetBucketReplication may return an empty/absent Rules array on some edge cases; require at least one rule before creating the job.

NoReplicationConfigForBatch.Cause: No live ReplicationConfiguration with rules exists on the source bucket. S3ReplicateObject batch jobs reuse the live replication config, so setup_cross_account_replication must run successfully before run_batch_replication (WR-05).

ShouldEnableReport.Comment: O1: branch on optional report bucket. The generic module owns no bucket, so when ReportBucketArn is absent the job runs with Report.Enabled:false (the Report block is still required by the CreateJob API).

CreateBatchJobWithReport.Comment: Create the S3 Batch Replication job with a completion report. Same-region only (Pitfall 5): AccountId and ExpectedBucketOwner are the source account; the SFN runs in the source region. SourceBucket and Report.Bucket are bucket ARNs, not names.

CreateBatchJobNoReport.Comment: Identical to CreateBatchJobWithReport but with Report.Enabled:false (the Report object is still required by the CreateJob API) and no Report.Bucket. Used when no ReportBucketArn is supplied (O1).

PrepareOutput.Comment: Normalize the success output. Surfaces the JobId for check_batch_replication to consume via $.BatchJob.JobId.

BatchJobFailed.Cause: Failed to create the S3 Batch Replication job (s3control:createJob). See $.Error for the underlying error.
